caption: A wide shot of a soccer stadium shows a lush green field being watered by an automated sprinkler system. The sprinkler is located near the center of the frame, spraying a misty arc of water across the turf. In the background, red stadium seating features large white letters spelling "GRANADA" across a section of the stands. Above the seating, several advertising banners are visible, including "CAJA RURAL", "PULEVA", "CERVEZAS ALHAMBRA", "COVIRAN", and the Real Madrid club logo. A digital advertising board along the perimeter of the field displays the text "EL REFERENTE DEL POKER ONLINE" and "WINAMAX". Small yellow markers are placed on the grass in the foreground. Across the sequence, the mist from the sprinkler shifts slightly as the water continues to flow, while the overall setting and the static advertisements remain unchanged.
